chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2361 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on Misc. No.270/2019 2. For hearing of main case 12.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Moiz Jafrii, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General No cause of action is demonstrated from the memorandum of petition and no case has been articulated by the learned counsel. This petition remains pending since 2018 with interim order on mere apprehension of surmises of the petitioner. Petition is found to be misconceived and frivolous is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
